features.featureTitle: Verify that the frontend actor hook (useActor.ts / useQueries.ts) always constructs the backend actor with the authenticated Internet Identity agent, so that msg.caller on the backend receives the real owner principal and not the anonymous principal. If any mutation call (addWorker, addHoliday, attendance mark) is invoked before the actor is fully initialized with the identity, add a guard that waits for actor readiness before dispatching the call.
